## Coding checklist

- [ ] No mandatory login, registration, hosted billing, cloud sync, telemetry upload, or remote incident upload was introduced.
- [ ] Local/BYOK/OpenAI-compatible provider paths were preserved where relevant.
- [ ] No sensitive info is written to logs, tests, docs, or fixtures.
- [ ] Tested the changed path locally.
